messages.text: You swing the cantor's knell into {target} and its hollow skulls toll a single deep note that drives the wound home. Your strike {verb} them!
{source} swings a cantor's knell into you and the bone bell tolls, its held note shuddering through your bones. The blows {verb} you!
{source} swings a cantor's knell into {target}, and the mace of fused skulls tolls a low, ringing note across the nave.
You heave the cantor's knell around at {target} and its heavy skulls sing past on the wrong note, striking only air.
{source} heaves a cantor's knell around at you and the tolling head sweeps past your ear.
{source} heaves a cantor's knell around at {target} and the bell-note dies unstruck.
You bring the cantor's knell down full on {target} and every hollow skull in its head tolls at once, folding the whole choir's held breath into the blow! Your strike {verb} them!
{source} brings a cantor's knell down full upon you and the bone bell tolls its whole chord into the strike! The blows {verb} you!
{source} brings a cantor's knell down full on {target} and the mace tolls a note that shakes dust from the singing walls!
